headline: POV: Mom Walks In Mid-Zoom Call, Asks 'Are You Talking To Yourself Again?'
summary: The video has been viewed by every remote worker who has ever experienced this trauma.
fullBody: TikToker Kevin Homeoffice captured the universal remote-work nightmare: his mother walking into his room during a client presentation to ask 'are you on that computer thing again?' and offering him a snack. 'I had to mute and explain that 'mute' doesn't mute real life,' Kevin said. The video has 120 million views. His mother now has her own fan account. She's still not sure what he does for work.
